title: barkhausia foetida proles gracilis

parts: Barkhausia foetida proles gracilis has many medicinal parts, such as its roots, which are known to contain alkaloids like berberine, and its leaves, which contain flavonoids like quercetin, and terpenoids like carvacrol.
